messages.content: VocГӘ Г© um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migraГ§ГЈo multicloud e modernizaГ§ГЈo on-premises. Seja tГ©cnico, objetivo e nГЈo invente serviГ§os inexistentes.
Como bloquear todo trГЎfego de entrada por padrГЈo e permitir apenas portas especГӯficas em uma Security List?

## Security List - Modelo Stateful com Default Deny

### PrincГӯpio de SeguranГ§a

O modelo stateful do OCI significa que:
- **Ingress:** Por padrГЈo nega tudo
- **Egress:** Por padrГЈo permite tudo
- **Retorno:** TrГЎfego de resposta Г© automГЎtico

### Passos de ImplementaГ§ГЈo

**1. Criar Security List com regras restritivas:**
```bash
oci network security-list create \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name "restrictive-sl" \
  --ingress-security-rules '[
    {"protocol": "6", "source": "10.0.1.0/24", "tcp-options": {"destination-port-range": {"min": 443, "max": 443}}},
    {"protocol": "6", "source": "10.0.2.0/24", "tcp-options": {"destination-port-range": {"min": 22, "max": 22}}}
  ]' \
  --egress-security-rules '[
    {"protocol": "all", "destination": "0.0.0.0/0"}
  ]'
```

**2. Verificar regras existentes:**
```bash
oci network security-list get \
  --security-list-id $SL_ID \
  --query "data"
```

**3. Atualizar regras (exemplo: adicionar porta 8080):**
```bash
oci network security-list update \
  --security-list-id $SL_ID \
  --ingress-security-rules '[
    {"protocol": "6", "source": "10.0.1.0/24", "tcp-options": {"destination-port-range": {"min": 443, "max": 443}}},
    {"protocol": "6", "source": "10.0.2.0/24", "tcp-options": {"destination-port-range": {"min": 22, "max": 22}}},
    {"protocol": "6", "source": "10.0.3.0/24", "tcp-options": {"destination-port-range": {"min": 8080, "max": 8080}}}
  ]' \
  --force
```

### Protocolos Suportados

| NГәmero | Protocolo | Uso Comum |
|--------|-----------|----------|
| 1 | ICMP | Ping, traceroute |
| 6 | TCP | HTTP, HTTPS, SSH, RDP |
| 17 | UDP | DNS, NTP |
| all | All | Todos os protocolos |

### Tabela de Portas Comuns

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Porta   в”Ӯ ServiГ§o               в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 22      в”Ӯ SSH                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 80      в”Ӯ HTTP                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 443     в”Ӯ HTTPS                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 1521    в”Ӯ Oracle DB             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 3306    в”Ӯ MySQL                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 5432    в”Ӯ PostgreSQL            в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 8080    в”Ӯ HTTP Alt              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 8443    в”Ӯ HTTPS Alt             в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Riscos e ConsideraГ§Гөes

| Risco | MitigaГ§ГЈo |
|-------|-----------|
| Lockout | Mantenha acesso via Bastion |
| Regra muito ampla | Use CIDRs especГӯficos |
| ICMP bloqueado | Adicione regra ICMP se necessГЎrio |

### Exemplo Completo - Web Tier

```bash
# Security List para Web com HTTPS-only
oci network security-list create \
  --vcn-id $VCN_ID \
  --display-name "web-tiers-sl" \
  --ingress-security-rules '[
    {
      "protocol": "6",
      "source": "0.0.0.0/0",
      "tcp-options": {
        "destination-port-range": {"min": 443, "max": 443}
      }
    }
  ]' \
  --egress-security-rules '[
    {
      "protocol": "6",
      "destination": "10.0.2.0/24",
      "tcp-options": {
        "destination-port-range": {"min": 8080, "max": 8080}
      }
    }
  ]'
```
